notes: FROZEN (agent=no). kiro-cli 2.5.1's shell tool (execute_bash) is synchronous — required:["command"], no run_in_background/background/async parameter (0 such tokens in the binary). The agent cannot dispatch a long-running shell process in the background and close the turn around it, so the #445/#450 working-while-bg arc has no agent behavior to elicit. The only async/background surface is delegate/use_subagent (subagent dispatch under .kiro/.subagents/), a different scenario family. No spec phases: nothing to observe. JSONL carries no model/token/cost, so observations are model unknown, cost/tokens zero.
